response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer with web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the resume shows no exposure to SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, deep neural network optimization, GPU architecture, or hardware-software co-design. The role is a Principal-level hardware performance architect position requiring deep specialization in areas where this candidate has no demonstrated background.
strengths: Long software engineering tenure with senior/staff titles
Some low-level/systems exposure via DLang, C/C++ at National Instruments
Bachelor's degree in CS plus 13+ years of professional experience
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware architecture experience
No AI accelerator, GPU, or deep learning workload optimization background
No SIMD/MIMD or hardware-software co-design experience

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No GPU or DNN optimization background
